creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

pav         2009-12-13 22:30:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    MOVED UPDATING 
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
    net-mgmt/zabbix-agent Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/zabbix-frontend Makefile 
    net-mgmt/zabbix-proxy Makefile 
    net-mgmt/zabbix-server Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
                           pkg-plist.agent pkg-plist.frontend 
    net-mgmt/zabbix-server/files pkg-message.in zabbix_agentd.in 
                                 zabbix_proxy.in zabbix_server.in 
    net-mgmt/zabbix16-agent Makefile 
    net-mgmt/zabbix16-frontend Makefile 
    net-mgmt/zabbix16-proxy Makefile 
    net-mgmt/zabbix16-server Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
                             pkg-plist.agent pkg-plist.frontend 
    net-mgmt/zabbix16-server/files 
                                   patch-src-zabbix_get-Makefile.in 
                                   patch-src-zabbix_sender-Makefile.in 
                                   pkg-message.in zabbix_agentd.in 
                                   zabbix_proxy.in 
                                   zabbix_server.in 
  Removed files:
    net-mgmt/zabbix      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-install 
                         pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/zabbix/files patch-configure pkg-message.in 
                          zabbix_proxy.in zabbix_server.sh.in 
    net-mgmt/zabbix-agent distinfo pkg-descr pkg-install 
    net-mgmt/zabbix-agent/files patch-configure zabbix_agentd.in 
  Log:
  - Update zabbix to 1.8
  - Split the port to server, frontend, agent and proxy slaves
  - Add zabbix16 for people who don't want to update to 1.8 yet
  
  PR:             ports/141364
  Submitted by:   Jim Riggs <ports@christianserving.org> (maintainer)
